2026-03-13IRCCImmigration and Refugee Protection ActReappointment of a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office)Reappointment of Antonia Johanne Schweitzer of Toronto, Ontario, as a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of two years.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office)
precis: Reappointment of Antonia Johanne Schweitzer of Toronto, Ontario, as a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of two years.
